type.title: Type
type.description: The type of block extracted from the document.

bbox.description: The bounding box of the block extracted from the document.

content.title: Content
content.description: The content of the block extracted from the document.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: (Experimental) The URL of the image associated with the block.

chart_data.title: Chart Data
chart_data.description: (Experimental) The URL/link to chart data JSON for figure blocks processed by chart agent.

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.description: The confidence for the block. It is either low or high and takes into account factors like OCR and table structure

granular_confidence.description: Granular confidence scores for the block. It is a dictionary of confidence scores for the block. The confidence scores will not be None if the user has enabled numeric confidence scores.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: Extra metadata fields for the block. Fields like 'is_chart' will only appear when set to True.
